creator: hakan@siktas.com
text:
Hi,

updating www/gitlab-ce via portmaster fails due to a missing file in this new port.

===>>> All >> gitlab-ce-11.7.5_1 >> devel/rubygem-jaeger-client (2/8)

===>  Cleaning for rubygem-jaeger-client-0.10.0

===> Fetching all distfiles required by rubygem-jaeger-client-0.10.0 for building
===>  Extracting for rubygem-jaeger-client-0.10.0
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for rubygem/jaeger-client-0.10.0.gem.
===>   rubygem-jaeger-client-0.10.0 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby24 - found

Unpacked gem: '/usr/ports/devel/rubygem-jaeger-client/work/jaeger-client-0.10.0'
